seoTitle: Hensley Park vs Henty — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hensley Park and Henty. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hensley Park vs Henty: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hensley Park and Henty.
heading: Hensley Park vs Henty — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hensley Park, Victoria and Henty, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Henty has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hensley Park (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hensley Park or Henty safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hensley Park has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Henty scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hensley Park scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Henty scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hensley Park or Henty?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Henty has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
